product.howItWorksDesc: Click «Request Price» — the item will be added to your cart. After submitting the request, suppliers will send offers with prices and lead times. You choose the best one.

home.step3Desc: Compare offers by price, delivery times, and warranty terms.
home.ctaDesc: We only send requests to suppliers who carry the right brand and category. No spam.

how.metaDesc: A platform for finding marine parts and receiving quotes from verified suppliers.
how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: A simple way to find marine parts and get the best price from verified suppliers.
how.b1Desc: Enter the name or SKU in the catalog search. If the item is not listed — contact our consultant via WhatsApp or Telegram.
how.b2Desc: Specify the required quantity and your contact details. The system automatically routes the request to suppliers who carry this item.
how.b3Desc: You will receive quotes with prices, delivery times, and warranty terms. Pick the most suitable one and contact the seller.
how.s1Desc: Add products to your inventory manually or upload an Excel spreadsheet with items, prices, and quantities.
how.s2Desc: The system sends you only requests where the buyer is looking for items in your inventory. No spam or irrelevant enquiries.
how.s3Title: Send an offer and close the deal
how.s3Desc: Reply with your price, lead time, and terms. If the buyer accepts your offer, you receive their contact details to finalise the deal.
how.faq1Q: How much does the platform cost?
how.faq1A: Completely free for buyers. For sellers — registration is free; cooperation terms are discussed individually.
how.faq2Q: How quickly will I receive offers?
how.faq2A: Usually within a few hours on a business day. Speed depends on the availability of the item with suppliers.
how.faq3Q: Can I request an item not listed in the catalog?
how.faq3A: Yes. If the item is not listed — write to us on WhatsApp or Telegram and we will help you find it.
how.faq4Q: How does a seller learn about a new request?
how.faq4A: Through notifications in the account. The request is sent only to sellers who carry the item in their inventory.
how.ctaDesc: Find the part you need or start receiving targeted orders.

about.metaDesc: OKnautic is a B2B marketplace for marine parts and yacht equipment. We connect buyers with verified suppliers.
about.title: A platform for the marine industry
about.subtitle: OKnautic connects marine equipment buyers with verified suppliers — fast, transparent, and without unnecessary intermediaries.
about.missionText1: Finding spare parts and equipment for yachts and vessels is slow, inconvenient, and opaque. Buyers spend hours on calls and emails, while sellers are flooded with irrelevant enquiries.
about.missionText2: OKnautic changes that. A buyer submits one request and receives offers from suppliers who already have the item in stock. Sellers only see requests that match their inventory.
about.forBuyers1: One request — offers from multiple suppliers
about.forBuyers2: Compare prices, lead times, and warranty terms
about.forBuyers3: Direct contact with the chosen seller
about.forSellers1: Only targeted requests matching your inventory
about.forSellers4: Manage all offers in one place
about.how1Desc: The buyer finds a product in the catalog and submits a price request.
about.how2Desc: Suppliers who carry the item send their terms and conditions.
about.how3Desc: The buyer selects the best offer and receives the seller's contact details.
about.how4Desc: Buyer and seller agree on payment and delivery directly.
about.ctaDesc: Find the part you need or start receiving targeted orders today.

insurance.metaDesc: Free insurance quote for your yacht or motorboat. We work with verified brokers in the Adriatic.
insurance.title: Yacht & Vessel Insurance
insurance.subtitle: Submit a request and we'll find the right coverage through verified insurance brokers in the Adriatic region.
insurance.benefit1Desc: We work only with licensed insurers in the Adriatic and Mediterranean.
insurance.benefit2Desc: A broker will contact you on the next business day with coverage options.
insurance.benefit3Desc: No obligations — just fill in the form and receive your proposal.
insurance.benefit4Desc: Sailing yachts, motorboats, catamarans, RIBs and commercial vessels.
insurance.claimsLast5: Had insurance claims in the last 5 years
insurance.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of obtaining an insurance quote *
insurance.errorConsent: Consent to data processing is required
insurance.successDesc: An insurance broker will contact you within 24 hours to discuss the details and provide a quote.
